name: Broiled Cheddar-Olive
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard cook the eggs and slice them into a medium-sized bowl.
2. Grate the cheddar and add it to the bowl with the sliced eggs.
3. Add the chopped olives, green bell pepper, and onion to the egg-cheddar mixture.
4. In a small cup or bowl, mix together the catsup, mayonnaise, prepared mustard, marjoram, oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir in the spices until well combined.
6. Add this spice mixture to the cheese and vegetable mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
7. Preheat the oven broiler.
8. If not already split, cut the buns open with a sharp knife, cut-side up.
9. Place the buns on the broiler rack, about 2 inches from the heat source, and broil until golden brown.
10. Remove the buns from the oven and spread butter on each side of the bun.
11. Spread about one-eighth of the cheddar mixture onto the buttered sides of each bun.
12. Return the sandwiches to the broiler, placing them 3 inches from the heat source.
13. Broil until the cheese is bubbly.
14. Serve immediately from the oven.
